name: Mayo Employees
description_short: Mayo Clinic's employee HR portal providing payroll, benefits, and leave management access for current, new, and former employees.
description_long:
Mayo Clinic is a major U.S. healthcare system that operates an employee services portal as part of its comprehensive HR infrastructure. The portal, accessible at myhr-prod-webapp.mayo.edu, serves as a centralized system for employee access to critical HR functions and information.

The platform provides three distinct user pathways: new employees complete pre-boarding through a Journeys workflow before their official start date; current employees access real-time pay, benefits, leave, and other employment services; and previous employees (retired, resigned, or on long-term disability) can retrieve historical pay records and pension information. The system integrates with existing Mayo Clinic accounts, whether from patient or prior employee status, streamlining the login process.

This service is distinguished by its integration into a major healthcare employer's ecosystem and its support for the full employee lifecycle—from onboarding through retirement. Unlike third-party HR platforms, this is Mayo Clinic's proprietary system, meaning it's optimized specifically for their employment structure and benefits offerings.

This is fundamentally an employee self-service portal, not a consumer financial product. It does not provide lending, credit access, advances, or alternative financial services. It is a standard HR information system that any large employer maintains. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Pay information access and payroll viewing
Historical pay records for previous employees
pros: Integrated pre-boarding process for new employees before start date
Centralized access to pay information for current employees
Benefits management and enrollment through single portal
Leave of absence tracking and management
Historical pay and pension access for former employees
Single sign-on for users with existing Mayo Clinic accounts
Support for retired, resigned, and long-term disability employees
cons: Not a financial services product—provides no lending or credit access
Access restricted to Mayo Clinic employees and former employees only
Miscategorized as 'payday-alternatives' when it's an HR platform, not a financial service
No consumer-facing financial assistance or emergency funding capabilities
Requires Mayo Clinic employment or prior affiliation to access
best_for: Current Mayo Clinic employees managing payroll and benefits
New Mayo Clinic hires completing onboarding
Retired or former Mayo Clinic employees accessing historical records
diagnosis: This is an internal Mayo Clinic HR portal, not a consumer financial service. It should not be categorized as a payday alternative or any financial product category. It belongs in 'banking' only as a loose fit for employee banking/payroll access, but accurately should be removed from CreditDoc entirely as it serves no consumer lending or financial assistance function.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
